name: Title 3
text:
Scholarium + Teach
Team alignment
textPreview: Scholarium + Teach | Team alignment

name: Subtitle 4
text:
Evidence Commons pre-alpha
Execution review - July 2026
textPreview: Evidence Commons pre-alpha | Execution review - July 2026

name: Google Shape;533;p58
text:
Every learning signal stays
connected to evidence,
context, and human choice.
textPreview: Every learning signal stays | connected to evidence, | context, and human choice.

name: Content Placeholder 15
text:
Product promise
A grade is one signal. Strengths, projects, effort, and context remain visible.
textPreview: Product promise | A grade is one signal. Strengths, projects, effort, and context remain visible.

name: Text Placeholder 16
text:
Execution rule
No capability is complete without a contract, test, direct proof, and named boundary.
textPreview: Execution rule | No capability is complete without a contract, test, direct proof, and named boundary.

name: Content Placeholder 9
text:
Empowerment
Difficulties guide support; they do not define the learner.
textPreview: Empowerment | Difficulties guide support; they do not define the learner.

name: Content Placeholder 10
text:
Edge-case first
Essential paths work without voice, mouse, or animation.
textPreview: Edge-case first | Essential paths work without voice, mouse, or animation.

name: Title 2
text: Four principles keep the suite coherent
textPreview: Four principles keep the suite coherent

name: Content Placeholder 9
text:
Provenance
Sources, evidence, uncertainty, and corrections travel with the record.
textPreview: Provenance | Sources, evidence, uncertainty, and corrections travel with the record.

name: Content Placeholder 10
text:
Human authority
AI structures and retrieves; learners and authorized people decide.
textPreview: Human authority | AI structures and retrieves; learners and authorized people decide.

name: Google Shape;534;p58
text:
One product boundary

Scholarium hosts Signal, Teach, AlgoQuest, courses, projects, circles, studio, and statistics.

Private computation crosses one versioned gateway. The web bundle imports no research runtime.
textPreview: One product boundary |  | Scholarium hosts Signal, Teach, AlgoQuest, courses, projects, circles, studio, and statistics. |  | Private com...

name: Google Shape;533;p58
text: Teach is one domain, not a second platform
textPreview: Teach is one domain, not a second platform

name: Picture 2
alt: Scholarium Teach platform architecture from people and the web product boundary through Gate5 to isolated private workers.

name: Google Shape;533;p58
text: The execution contract is four gates, not a feature pile
textPreview: The execution contract is four gates, not a feature pile

name: Content Placeholder 10
text:
Access and dignity
Eight accessibility profiles plus keyboard, screen reader, and motion controls.
textPreview: Access and dignity | Eight accessibility profiles plus keyboard, screen reader, and motion controls.

name: Content Placeholder 10
text:
Learning loop
Spanish recall, help levels, context transfer, and resumable checkpoints.
textPreview: Learning loop | Spanish recall, help levels, context transfer, and resumable checkpoints.

name: Content Placeholder 10
text:
Private computation
Gate5, Synthia, memory, retrieval, FNP-QNN, and media remain outside the web bundle.
textPreview: Private computation | Gate5, Synthia, memory, retrieval, FNP-QNN, and media remain outside the web bundle.

name: Content Placeholder 10
text:
Social evidence
Growth stories, projects, circles, recognition, and multidimensional analytics.
textPreview: Social evidence | Growth stories, projects, circles, recognition, and multidimensional analytics.

name: Content Placeholder 15
text: Each gate needs a versioned contract, direct test evidence, lifecycle handling, and an explicit authority boundary.
textPreview: Each gate needs a versioned contract, direct test evidence, lifecycle handling, and an explicit authority boundary.

name: Content Placeholder 8
text:
Now
Close G12

Stitch identity, role guides, diagrams, and review artifacts tell one system story.
textPreview: Now | Close G12 |  | Stitch identity, role guides, diagrams, and review artifacts tell one system story.

name: Content Placeholder 8
text:
Next
Prove G13

Contracts, accessibility, privacy, failure, load, and visual tests close quality claims.
textPreview: Next | Prove G13 |  | Contracts, accessibility, privacy, failure, load, and visual tests close quality claims.

name: Content Placeholder 8
text:
Then
Prepare G14

Tunnel, observability, backup, cPanel, Cloudflare, GitHub, and final audit.
textPreview: Then | Prepare G14 |  | Tunnel, observability, backup, cPanel, Cloudflare, GitHub, and final audit.

name: Google Shape;533;p58
text: Edge-case-first design defines the baseline
textPreview: Edge-case-first design defines the baseline

name: Content Placeholder 10
text: Text-first, signed content when available, and assisted communication preserve the objective.
textPreview: Text-first, signed content when available, and assisted communication preserve the objective.

name: Content Placeholder 10
text: No voice
textPreview: No voice

name: Content Placeholder 10
text: Keyboard, screen reader, clear focus, and large targets cover essential paths.
textPreview: Keyboard, screen reader, clear focus, and large targets cover essential paths.

name: Content Placeholder 10
text: No mouse
textPreview: No mouse

name: Content Placeholder 10
text: Predictable sequences, no penalty for tics or delay, and visible next actions reduce friction.
textPreview: Predictable sequences, no penalty for tics or delay, and visible next actions reduce friction.

name: Content Placeholder 10
text: Low surprise
textPreview: Low surprise

textPreview: Motion, contrast, saturation, density, sound, speed, width, and spacing remain controllable.

name: Google Shape;534;p58
text:
Access is a product contract

Deaf and signed, non-verbal, Autism Calm, Tourette Safe, ADHD Sprint, Dyslexia Reading, and Dyspraxia Motor are first-class delivery modes.

Preferences change presentation and interaction demands, never a person's dignity.
textPreview: Access is a product contract |  | Deaf and signed, non-verbal, Autism Calm, Tourette Safe, ADHD Sprint, Dyslexia Reading, and Dyspraxia M...

name: Title 7
text: Social mechanics turn progress into evidence
textPreview: Social mechanics turn progress into evidence

name: Content Placeholder 8
text:
Growth stories
A result, its evidence, context, and learner reflection remain connected.
textPreview: Growth stories | A result, its evidence, context, and learner reflection remain connected.

name: Content Placeholder 9
text:
Project threads
Milestones, versions, files, sources, and contributions make process visible.
textPreview: Project threads | Milestones, versions, files, sources, and contributions make process visible.

name: Content Placeholder 10
text:
Circles and recognition
Class, team, art, music, interests, mutual aid, perseverance, creativity, and leadership.
textPreview: Circles and recognition | Class, team, art, music, interests, mutual aid, perseverance, creativity, and leadership.

name: Content Placeholder 15
text: The platform preserves honest difficulty and specific success without collapsing a person into one grade or one popularity score.
textPreview: The platform preserves honest difficulty and specific success without collapsing a person into one grade or one popularity score.

name: Google Shape;533;p58
textPreview: Decisions stay with learners | and authorized humans; | assistants exchange bounded projections.

name: Content Placeholder 15
text:
Learner controls interpretation
Accept, reformulate, contest, expire, or delete every proposed strength bridge.
textPreview: Learner controls interpretation | Accept, reformulate, contest, expire, or delete every proposed strength bridge.

name: Text Placeholder 16
text:
Organizations see aggregates
Course summaries exclude the private graph; administration requires cohorts of at least ten.
textPreview: Organizations see aggregates | Course summaries exclude the private graph; administration requires cohorts of at least ten.
